evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Builder mindset preferring automation over repetition; comfort with ambiguity and rigorous data quality standards
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Startup-speed builder framing sits in parity with explicit rigorous data quality standards, giving a mixed classification.
evidence.domain_risk: provider cost and margin analysis across 20+ data sources
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Errors affect business/commercial decisions (margin, activation, credit consumption) without regulatory or financial-reporting consequence.
evidence.data_team_maturity: This is FullEnrich's inaugural dedicated data hire
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Explicitly the company's first data hire, tasked with owning the data layer end-to-end from an existing but unowned stack.
evidence.jd_authorship: Implement reverse ETL pipelines pushing operational data to systems like Intercom and HubSpot
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise tools, named metrics work, and scale context (20+ providers, 3,500+ customers) show exactly what the role involves.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Design data models ensuring reliable access to the metrics across Finance, Marketing, RevOps, Sales, and Support teams
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Five distinct functions — commercial (RevOps, Sales), finance, and internal teams — are named with genuinely equal weight.
evidence.autonomy_level: owning the data layer end-to-end while building foundational systems for organizational growth
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Full end-to-end ownership language as the first data hire is unambiguously strategic direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role: Active use of AI tools (Cursor, Claude) for work augmentation
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is explicitly expected to use AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude Code) to accelerate their own work.
evidence.testing_framing: Write tests and maintain documentation standards
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is listed as an owned responsibility of the role alongside documentation standards.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: None: framing is entirely about ownership, building, and delivery with no risk register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: building foundational systems for organizational growth
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: First data hire building foundational systems from an existing but informally-owned stack is a greenfield mandate.
